# Rixly

Rixly finds warm leads across platforms and turns them into sales.

Primary URL: https://userixly.com/
Blog: https://userixly.com/blogs
Request Demo: https://userixly.com/request-demo

Policies:
- https://userixly.com/policies/privacy
- https://userixly.com/policies/terms
- https://userixly.com/policies/cancelandrefund

Detailed product guidance for language models:
- https://userixly.com/llms-full.txt
